Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT BRENNAN NEWSOM'S Motion For Reconsideration Of The Granting Of Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Entry Of Judgment And/ Or In The Alternative To Set Aside The Judgment IS DENIED. THE COURT MAY NOT RECONSIDER ITS ORDER FOLLOWING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter, Rhonda Aquilina, CSR # 9956 =301/EHG
